---
title: "La fée des grèves"
---

## La fée des grèves

**Author:** Paul Féval
**Date:** 1851
**Imprint:** Brussels: Meline

### Notes

This seems to be the earliest edition of the novel, and not, as CMY assumed, the 1853 Paris edition of J. Dagneau.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
